title: Buy 19 September 2021 Exceptional Dividend Dogs Now
text: Last year, May-August 2021, Kiplinger-Today listed eight sets of stocks sorted as: best-buys for 2021, infrastructure-plays, value, growth, small-cap, high-yield, housing-bets, and cash-flow-gushers. Those eight "exceptional-dividend" articles revealed 86-equities, 76-paying-dividends. Kiplinger article-titles were, '21 Best Stocks to Buy'; '14 Best Infrastructure Stocks'; '16 Best Value; '10 Dividends-Growth'; '6 Small-Cap'; '10 High-Yield 4% or More;' '12 Housing; '10 Cash-Flow-Gushers.'

title: What's in Store for Banks as Fed Signals More Rate Hikes, Slowdown?
text: The current situation is like a double-edged sword for banks, including JPMorgan (JPM), Bank of America (BAC), Huntington (HBAN), BOK Financial (BOKF) & Zions (ZION), as the Fed signals more rate hikes and also projects significant economic slowdown.

title: HUNTINGTON BANCSHARES INCORPORATED INCREASES ITS PRIME RATE TO 6.25 PERCENT
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio , Sept. 22, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (Nasdaq: HBAN) announced that its prime rate is increasing from 5.5 percent to 6.25 percent, effective September 22, 2022.

title: Huntington Bank Celebrates Opening of Commercial Bank Headquarters in New Huntington Tower in Downtown Detroit
text: Detroit's Huntington Tower is the newest office building development in downtown Detroit in over 30 years. Huntington colleagues will converge on the city for work, dining, and experiences at local businesses and venues.

title: Banks raise less money from debt and equity deals in August
text: Capital markets issuance by U.S. banks fell to $4.65 billion in August, down nearly 28% from year-ago levels and a drop of 64% from July, S&P Global Market Intelligence said Tuesday. Senior debt remained the largest deal type in August with $3.2 billion, down 72% from July's total of about $12 billion.

title: Why Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) is a Top Dividend Stock for Your Portfolio
text: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) have what it takes?

title: Clēnera, an Enlight Company, Closes on Financing for Montana Utility-Scale Solar Project
text: Bank of America and NORD/LB will provide the construction financing, and Huntington National Bank will provide the tax equity financing for the 105 MWdc solar project BOISE, Idaho, Sept. 15, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, Clēnera, an Enlight company (TASE: ENLT), is pleased to announce the closing of construction and tax equity financing for the 105 MWdc Apex Solar project located in Beaverhead County, Montana.

title: HUNTINGTON BANCSHARES TO SPEAK AT THE BARCLAYS GLOBAL FINANCIAL SERVICES CONFERENCE
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio , Sept. 7, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (Nasdaq: HBAN) announced today that Chief Financial Officer Zach Wasserman will present at the Barclays Global Financial Services Conference on Monday, September 12, 2022, at 9:00 AM (Eastern Time).

title: Huntington Bancshares Remains Too Good To Sell
text: Huntington Bancshares is one of America's largest regional banks with a huge footprint in the Midwest. The company offers a very high dividend yield and a valuation well below fair value.
